items.summary: Leading backend development for a large-scale warehouse management platform supporting multiple distributed services.
highlights: Designed and maintained event-driven microservices communicating through Google Pub/Sub and Azure Service Bus
Architected message routing mechanisms across heterogeneous messaging infrastructures
Led a backend team of 8 engineers across architecture decisions, sprint planning, code reviews, and delivery
Improved service reliability, scalability, and maintainability through clean architecture and distributed systems practices
Worked on large-scale data orchestration, validation pipelines, and service integration

items.summary: Designed and developed backend services processing terabytes of manufacturing data weekly.
highlights: Built scalable gRPC-based communication layers for internal distributed systems
Developed Kafka-driven event processing workflows for real-time service coordination
Improved backend throughput through Redis caching and performance optimization
Reduced deployment cycle time through Kubernetes, Docker, and Terraform automation
Integrated S3-compatible object storage systems to improve retrieval latency
Implemented secure CI/CD pipelines with BlackDuck security scanning and compliance enforcement
Achieved zero open compliance issues through proactive vulnerability remediation

items.summary: Re-architected and migrated critical Debit Card Services from Java to Golang.
highlights: Developed highly available backend services supporting card lifecycle management
Built real-time event propagation mechanisms using Google Pub/Sub
Used Aerospike and Redis to optimize storage and reduce latency
Conducted regular security audits and vulnerability reviews, reducing incidents by 30%
Implemented infrastructure automation using Kubernetes and Terraform

items.summary: Modernized legacy monolithic systems into distributed microservices.
highlights: Increased system throughput through service decomposition and optimization
Implemented Kafka-based asynchronous communication patterns
Built gRPC service communication layers
Automated CI/CD workflows and increased deployment frequency
Improved observability using Grafana dashboards and monitoring systems

items.summary: Developed financial and healthcare platforms from the ground up, with backend APIs, banking integrations, and product engineering delivery.
highlights: Built backend APIs using Golang and Gin Framework
Integrated banking APIs and optimized transaction processing performance
Established CI/CD pipelines and engineering best practices
Mentored junior developers and conducted code reviews
Built Fikrabot document verification workflows and Medzimi healthcare platform services
